content.content:
1→# 🎨 K3RN.LABS - Brand & Design Repository
     2→
     3→Ce dossier contient **l'unique source de vérité** pour l'identité visuelle et l'UI de K3RN.LABS.
     4→
     5→## 🏆 Hiérarchie des Documents
     6→
     7→1.  **`brand_book.html` (SOURCE DE VÉRITÉ ABSOLUE)**  
     8→    C'est la référence visuelle et interactive définitive. Si un doute subsiste, c'est ce fichier qui fait foi. Il contient le rendu exact des couleurs, des ombres (`shadow-glow`), des arrondis (`radius-2xl`), et des typographies (`Inter`).
     9→    > **Usage** : À ouvrir dans un navigateur pour visualiser le rendu final attendu.
    10→
    11→2.  **`k3rn.labs_ui_design_system_canonical.md` (RÉFÉRENCE TECHNIQUE)**  
    12→    C'est la traduction technique du Brand Book HTML. Il liste les tokens (variables CSS, valeurs HEX, règles d'espacement) que les développeurs doivent implémenter. Il est strictement aligné sur le HTML.
    13→    > **Usage** : À utiliser par les développeurs pour configurer `globals.css` et `tailwind.config.js`.
    14→
    15→3.  **`logo_k3rb.labs/` (ACTIFS GRAPHIQUES)**  
    16→    Contient les fichiers sources du logo (SVG, PNG).
    17→    > **Note** : Le logo officiel pour le header est la version **icon-only white** (`logo_04.svg`).
    18→
    19→---
    20→
    21→## 🚀 Guide d'Implémentation
    22→
    23→### Pour les Développeurs
    24→*   **Ne jamais inventer de valeurs.** Utilisez uniquement les tokens définis dans le `.md`.
    25→*   **Respectez le "Modern Rounded".** Les cartes ont un arrondi de **24px** (`radius-2xl`), pas moins.
    26→*   **Typography**. La font est `Inter`. Les titres Hero sont en `Light (300)`.
    27→
    28→### Pour les Designers
    29→*   Référez-vous au `brand_book.html` pour comprendre l'ambiance "Dark Mode" et l'usage précis de l'accent Orange (`#F75105`).
    30→*   L'interface est minimaliste, sombre, avec des touches de lumière (Glow) très ciblées.
    31→
    32→---
    33→*© 2026 K3RN.LABS - Design System*
    34→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

1→# K3RN.LABS — BRAND & UI DESIGN SYSTEM (CANONICAL)
     2→
     3→**Source de Vérité :** `brand_book.html`  
     4→**Statut :** Contractuel — Absolu  
     5→**Version :** 2.0 (Alignement HTML Brand Book)
     6→
     7→Ce document définit les règles visuelles strictes extraites du Brand Book HTML. Toute interface K3RN.LABS doit s'y conformer au pixel près.
     8→
     9→---
    10→
    11→## 1. COULEURS & THÈME
    12→
    13→### 1.1 Brand Colors
    14→Couleurs identitaires, à utiliser avec précision.
    15→
    16→| Token | Valeur HEX | Usage |
    17→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    18→| `--brand-primary` | `#F75105` | **Orange K3RN** (Action, Accent, Brand) |
    19→| `--brand-secondary` | `#F78E21` | Orange Clair (Hover, Gradient) |
    20→
    21→### 1.2 Neutral Scale (Dark Mode)
    22→L'interface est exclusivement sombre ("Dark Mode").
    23→
    24→| Token | Valeur HEX | Usage |
    25→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    26→| `--neutral-darkest` | `#000000` | Fond global (Body) |
    27→| `--neutral-dark-900` | `#22242B` | Surfaces sombres, Backgrounds alternatifs |
    28→| `--neutral-dark-800` | `#2F323A` | Surfaces intermédiaires |
    29→| `--neutral-dark-700` | `#5D5C5B` | Bordures fortes, Formes graphiques |
    30→| `--neutral-light-300` | `#D2D3D4` | Texte principal |
    31→| `--neutral-lightest` | `#FFFFFF` | Texte blanc pur (Titres, Accents) |
    32→
    33→### 1.3 Backgrounds
    34→Niveaux de profondeur.
    35→
    36→| Token | Valeur | Application |
    37→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    38→| `--bg-primary` | `#000000` | **Page Background** |
    39→| `--bg-secondary` | `#0F0F0F` | Sections secondaires, Inputs |
    40→| `--bg-card` | `#1A1A1A` | **Cartes standard** |
    41→| `--bg-card-hover` | `#22242B` | État survolé des cartes |
    42→
    43→### 1.4 Borders
    44→Subtilité et semi-transparence.
    45→
    46→| Token | Valeur RGBA |
    47→| :--- | :--- |
    48→| `--border-subtle` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` |
    49→| `--border-default` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)` |
    50→| `--border-strong` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)` |
    51→
    52→---
    53→
    54→## 2. TYPOGRAPHIE
    55→
    56→**Font Family** : `Inter`, -apple-system, sans-serif.
    57→
    58→### 2.1 Échelle (Scale)
    59→
    60→| Rôle | Token | Taille | Poids | Usage |
    61→| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    62→| **Hero Title** | `.hero-title` | `5.5rem` (88px) | Light (300) | Impact Marque (Home) |
    63→| **Section Title** | `.section-title` | `3rem` (48px) | Light (300) | En-têtes de section |
    64→| **Card Title** | `.card-title` | `1.25rem` (20px) | Semibold (600) | Titres de blocs |
    65→| **Section Numero** | `.section-number` | `0.75rem` (12px) | Bold (700) | Label technique (uppercase) |
    66→| **Body** | `body` | `1rem` (16px) | Regular (400) | Contenu par défaut |
    67→| **Description** | `.section-description` | `1.125rem` (18px) | Light (300) | Intro de section |
    68→| **Small / Link** | `.nav-link` | `0.875rem` (14px) | Medium (500) | Navigation, Détails |
    69→
    70→### 2.2 Règles
    71→- **Letter Spacing** : 
    72→    - Titres Hero/Brand : `0.05em`
    73→    - Section Number : `0.1em`
    74→- **Line Height** : 
    75→    - Hero : `1` (Compact)
    76→    - Body : `1.5 - 1.6` (Aéré)
    77→
    78→---
    79→
    80→## 3. ESPACEMENT (SPACING)
    81→
    82→Grille fluide. Tokens obligatoires.
    83→
    84→| Token | Valeur | px (base 16) |
    85→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    86→| `--space-1` | 0.25rem | 4px |
    87→| `--space-2` | 0.5rem | 8px |
    88→| `--space-3` | 0.75rem | 12px |
    89→| `--space-4` | 1rem | 16px |
    90→| `--space-6` | 1.5rem | 24px |
    91→| `--space-8` | 2rem | 32px |
    92→| `--space-12` | 3rem | 48px |
    93→| `--space-16` | 4rem | 64px |
    94→| `--space-20` | 5rem | 80px |
    95→
    96→---
    97→
    98→## 4. FORMES & RAYONS (RADIUS)
    99→
   100→**Esthétique** : "Modern Rounded" (Douceur et fluidité).
   101→Contrairement à l'ancienne charte "Industrielle", K3RN.LABS adopte des courbes prononcées pour ses conteneurs.
   102→
   103→| Token | Valeur | Usage Clé |
   104→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
   105→| `--radius-sm` | `0.375rem` (6px) | Boutons, Badges |
   106→| `--radius-md` | `0.5rem` (8px) | Inputs, Éléments internes |
   107→| `--radius-lg` | `0.75rem` (12px) | Conteneurs moyens |
   108→| `--radius-xl` | `1rem` (16px) | Gros composants |
   109→| `--radius-2xl` | `1.5rem` (24px) | **CARTES STANDARD** (Card, Section block) |
   110→| `--radius-full` | `9999px` | Badges ronds, Boutons "Pill" |
   111→
   112→---
   113→
   114→## 5. OMBRES & EFFETS (SHADOWS)
   115→
   116→| Token | Valeur | Usage |
   117→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
   118→| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05)` | Subtil |
   119→| `--shadow-md` | `0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3)` | Élevation standard |
   120→| `--shadow-lg` | `0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4)` | Overlay, Floating |
   121→| **`--shadow-glow`** | `0 0 30px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.3)` | **Signature Brand** (Orange Glow) |
   122→
   123→---
   124→
   125→## 6. COMPOSANTS CLÉS (ATOMIC)
   126→
   127→### 6.1 Card (Standard)
   128→Le bloc de construction principal de l'interface.
   129→- **Background** : `--bg-card`
   130→- **Border** : `1px solid --border-default`
   131→- **Radius** : `--radius-2xl` (24px)
   132→- **Padding** : `--space-8` (32px)
   133→- **Hover** : Background devient `--bg-card-hover`, Border devient `--border-strong`.
   134→
   135→### 6.2 Button (Primary)
   136→- **Background** : `--brand-primary`
   137→- **Text** : Blanc
   138→- **Radius** : `--radius-md` (8px)
   139→- **Hover** : Shadow Glow + Transform Y -1px.
   140→
   141→### 6.3 Hero Badge
   142→Élément de marque en haut de page.
   143→- **Style** : Pill (`radius-full`)
   144→- **Border** : `1px solid --border-default`
   145→- **Dot** : Cercle 6px `--brand-primary` avec animation `pulse`.
   146→
   147→### 6.4 Icon Visual (Signature)
   148→Composition graphique complexe pour les icônes de fonctionnalité.
   149→1.  **Conteneur** : Centré, relatif.
   150→2.  **Shape (Fond)** : Forme organique (`border-radius: 40% 60%...`) avec `linear-gradient(135deg, --neutral-dark-700, --neutral-light-300)`.
   151→3.  **Accent** : Point orange (`--brand-primary`) positionné en absolu avec `shadow-glow`.
   152→
   153→---
   154→
   155→## 7. CHECKLIST DE CONFORMITÉ
   156→
   157→Toute nouvelle page ou fonctionnalité doit valider ces points :
   158→
   159→- [ ] **Background** : La page est `--bg-primary` (#000000).
   160→- [ ] **Font** : `Inter` est utilisée partout.
   161→- [ ] **Cards** : Les cartes ont un arrondi de **24px** (`radius-2xl`) et une bordure de 1px.
   162→- [ ] **Brand Glow** : L'effet de lueur orange est utilisé avec parcimonie (Accents, Hover importants).
   163→- [ ] **Spacing** : Les marges sont généreuses (min `space-8` ou `space-12` entre blocs majeurs).
   164→
   165→---
   166→*© 2026 K3RN.LABS - Document Canonique*
   167→

content.text: Now let me check the Product Vision and Product Requirements documents as they may contain relevant design information:

content.content:
We solve the universal problem of idea capture and development by providing an AI-powered ecosystem that transforms scattered thoughts into validated, fundable businesses. Unlike traditional development tools or no-code platforms, k3rn.labs operates as a complete incubator—from voice note capture to equity investment—with 9 specialized AI experts working as a real team in an intuitive visual workspace.
- **Visual coworking workspace** with AI experts as real team members
- **No-code tools**: "Design your app, we'll deploy"
3. **Develop** it visually with 9 specialized AI experts in a coworking workspace
k3rn.labs gives you **9 specialized experts in a visual workspace** where you can:
- Visual workspace with AI team developing alongside you
- Visual workspace shows progress and decisions
| **AI Assistants** (ChatGPT, Claude) | General-purpose conversation | We have **9 specialized experts with real market data access** in a visual workspace. They're single-agent chat. |
**k3rn.labs = Digital Incubator + AI Agency + Visual Workspace + Investment Platform**
   - Premium design from day 1 (Payrix-inspired)
   - Visual interactions (sliders, drag-drop, choice cards)
- Landing page design: $2k-10k (partner network)
- Branding package: $5k-25k (partner network)
- Activate partner ecosystem (Cursor, Lovable, designers, marketers)
- Recognized brand in startup ecosystem globally

**Audience:** Product Team, Engineering Team, Design Team, QA Team  
k3rn.labs is a digital incubator platform that enables users to capture, develop, validate, and launch ideas through an AI-powered visual workspace with 9 specialized experts, integrated market validation, financial simulation, and community equity crowdfunding.
**Core Components:**
- Role: Content Creator / Freelance Designer
5. Speaks for 45 seconds: "App idea... ADHD management... visual project boards..."
    ⚪ B) Build long-term brand
33. Expert suggests MVP: "Visual kanban + daily check-in + focus timer"
- [ ] Visual recording indicator
- [ ] Visual score indicator (color-coded: <50% red, 50-75% yellow, >75% green)
- [ ] Color-coded tags
**Description:** Visual workspace with infinite pan/zoom capability
- [ ] Each card type has distinct visual style
- [ ] Card color coding by type or status
**Description:** Visual links between related cards
- [ ] Folder card has visual indicator (folder icon)
2. **Design Thinking (DT)**
   - Domain: UX/UI, user experience, product design
   - MCP Connections: Figma API (fetch design trends)
- [ ] Each expert has unique avatar and color
**Inspiration:** 21st.dev conversation design - experts guide users with intelligent, context-aware questions and multiple-choice options
  - B) Build long-term brand
**UI Components:**
│  ⚪ B) Build long-term brand             │
- [ ] Question appears in chat as distinct UI component (not plain text)
- [ ] Choice cards visually distinct (cards with borders, not just text)
- [ ] Responsive design (stacks on mobile)
**Frontend (React Components):**
- `<GuidedQuestion>` component
- `<ChoiceCard>` component
- `<QuestionProgress>` component
- [ ] Image/icon choices (visual options, not just text)
- [ ] Report generated with visualizations (charts)
- [ ] Visualization (line chart)
- [ ] Visualizations: revenue curve chart, breakdown pie charts
- [ ] Visual dashboard (KPI cards)
- **Progress Timeline:** Visual phases (Ideation → Validation → Development → Launch → Scale)
- [ ] Responsive design (mobile-friendly)
- [ ] Accent color customization
**Description:** Export validated project as complete, ready-to-develop repository with all generated components, configurations, and setup instructions.
│   ├── components/             # UI components generated by experts

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me compile a comprehensive report of all the design information. Let me create a summary document for you:

---

## COMPREHENSIVE K3RN.LABS BRAND DESIGN DOCUMENTATION ANALYSIS

I have thoroughly explored and read all design files in the `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/brand_design/` folder and related documentation. Here is the complete inventory:

### FILES REVIEWED

1. **README.md** - Design hierarchy and implementation guide
2. **k3rn.labs_ui_design_system_canonical.md** - Technical design system reference
3. **brand_book.html** - Complete interactive brand book (2045 lines)
4. **Logo assets** - 8 files (4 SVG variants + 4 PNG variants + logo_05.png)
   - logo_01.svg/png - Full logo (light background)
   - logo_02.svg/png - Full logo (dark background)
   - logo_03.svg/png - Compact logo
   - logo_04.svg/png - Icon-only white (official header logo)
   - logo_05.png - Additional variant

---

## COMPLETE DESIGN TOKENS & SPECIFICATIONS

### 1. COLOR PALETTE

#### Brand Colors
| Token | HEX Value | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `--brand-primary` | `#F75105` | Primary Orange (Action, Accent, Brand) |
| `--brand-secondary` | `#F78E21` | Secondary Orange (Hover States, Gradients) |

#### Neutral Scale (Dark Mode Exclusive)
| Token | HEX Value | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `--neutral-darkest` | `#000000` | Background global (Body) |
| `--neutral-dark-900` | `#22242B` | Surfaces sombres, Alt backgrounds |
| `--neutral-dark-800` | `#2F323A` | Surfaces intermédiaires |
| `--neutral-dark-700` | `#5D5C5B` | Bordures fortes, Formes graphiques |
| `--neutral-light-300` | `#D2D3D4` | Texte principal |
| `--neutral-lightest` | `#FFFFFF` | Texte blanc pur (Titres, Accents) |

#### Background Colors
| Token | HEX Value | Application |
|-------|-----------|--------------|
| `--bg-primary` | `#000000` | **Page Background** |
| `--bg-secondary` | `#0F0F0F` | Sections secondaires, Inputs |
| `--bg-card` | `#1A1A1A` | **Cartes standard** |
| `--bg-card-hover` | `#22242B` | État survolé des cartes |

#### Text Colors
| Token | HEX Value | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `--text-primary` | `#FAFAFA` | Primary text content |
| `--text-secondary` | `#A1A1AA` | Secondary text, descriptions |
| `--text-muted` | `#71717A` | Muted/metadata text |

#### Border Colors (Transparent/RGBA)
| Token | RGBA Value |
|-------|-----------|
| `--border-subtle` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` |
| `--border-default` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)` |
| `--border-strong` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)` |

#### Semantic/Functional Colors
| Token | HEX Value | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| Success | `#22C55E` | Success states |
| Warning | `#EAB308` | Warning alerts |
| Error | `#EF4444` | Error states |
| Info | `#3B82F6` | Information |

---

### 2. TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM

**Font Family:** `Inter`, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif

#### Typography Scale & Hierarchy

| Role | CSS Class | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage |
|------|-----------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| **Hero Title** | `.hero-title` | 5.5rem (88px) | Light (300) | 1 | 0.05em | Impact brand (Home hero) |
| **Section Title** | `.section-title` | 3rem (48px) | Light (300) | 1.1 | 0 | Section headers |
| **Card Title** | `.card-title` | 1.25rem (20px) | Semibold (600) | 1.2 | 0 | Block titles |
| **Section Number** | `.section-number` | 0.75rem (12px) | Bold (700) | 1 | 0.1em | Technical labels (UPPERCASE) |
| **Section Description** | `.section-description` | 1.125rem (18px) | Light (300) | 1.6 | 0 | Intro text |
| **Body Regular** | `body` | 1rem (16px) | Regular (400) | 1.5-1.6 | 0 | Default content |
| **Body Large** | `.body-lg` | 1.125rem (18px) | Regular (400) | 1.7 | 0 | Presentation text |
| **Body Small** | `.body-sm` | 0.875rem (14px) | Regular (400) | 1.5 | 0 | Details/navigation |
| **Nav Link** | `.nav-link` | 0.875rem (14px) | Medium (500) | 1.5 | 0 | Navigation |
| **Caption** | `.caption` | 0.75rem (12px) | Regular (400) | 1.4 | 0.02em | Metadata/labels |

#### Typography Rules
- **Hero/Brand Titles:** Letter spacing 0.05em, super compact line height (1)
- **Body Text:** Line height 1.5-1.6 for readability
- **Section Numbers:** Text-transform UPPERCASE with 0.1em letter spacing
- **Font Weights:** 300 (Light), 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium), 600 (Semibold), 700 (Bold), 800 (Extra Bold)

---

### 3. SPACING SYSTEM

**Grid Base:** 4px foundation (pixel-perfect alignment)

| Token | Value | Pixels | Usage |
|-------|-------|--------|-------|
| `--space-1` | 0.25rem | 4px | Minimal spacing |
| `--space-2` | 0.5rem | 8px | Small gaps |
| `--space-3` | 0.75rem | 12px | Badge gaps |
| `--space-4` | 1rem | 16px | Default padding |
| `--space-6` | 1.5rem | 24px | Grid gaps |
| `--space-8` | 2rem | 32px | **Card padding, major gaps** |
| `--space-12` | 3rem | 48px | Section spacing |
| `--space-16` | 4rem | 64px | Major sections |
| `--space-20` | 5rem | 80px | Page sections |

**Design Principle:** Generous spacing enforced throughout for "respiration" and minimalism.

---

### 4. BORDER RADIUS SYSTEM (Modern Rounded Aesthetic)

**Key Principle:** Esthetic shift from "Industrial" to "Modern Rounded" (curves and softness)

| Token | Value | px | Usage |
|-------|-------|-----|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | 0.375rem | 6px | Buttons, Badges, small elements |
| `--radius-md` | 0.5rem | 8px | **Button standard**, Inputs, internal elements |
| `--radius-lg` | 0.75rem | 12px | Medium containers |
| `--radius-xl` | 1rem | 16px | Large components |
| `--radius-2xl` | 1.5rem | **24px** | **CARD STANDARD** (All cards & sections must use) |
| `--radius-full` | 9999px | Circular | Badge pills, circular buttons |

**Critical Rule:** Cards MUST have 24px radius (`--radius-2xl`), never less. This is the "Modern Rounded" signature.

---

### 5. SHADOW & EFFECTS SYSTEM

| Token | CSS Value | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05)` | Subtle elevation |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3)` | Standard elevation |
| `--shadow-lg` | `0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4)` | Floating, overlays |
| **`--shadow-glow`** | `0 0 30px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.3)` | **Signature Brand effect** (Orange glow on primary buttons) |

**Interaction Effect:** Primary buttons on hover apply `--shadow-glow` + `transform: translateY(-1px)` for lift effect.

---

### 6. COMPONENT SPECIFICATIONS

#### **CARD (Standard)**
- **Background:** `--bg-card` (#1A1A1A)
- **Border:** 1px solid `--border-default`
- **Border Radius:** `--radius-2xl` (24px) - CRITICAL
- **Padding:** `--space-8` (32px)
- **Hover State:**
  - Background → `--bg-card-hover` (#22242B)
  - Border → `--border-strong`
  - Transition: `all 0.3s ease`

#### **BUTTON - PRIMARY**
- **Background:** `--brand-primary` (#F75105)
- **Text Color:** White
- **Border Radius:** `--radius-md` (8px)
- **Padding:** `--space-3` (12px) vertical, `--space-6` (24px) horizontal
- **Font:** Inter, 0.875rem, weight 600
- **Hover State:**
  - Background → `--brand-secondary` (#F78E21)
  - Box-shadow → `--shadow-glow`
  - Transform → `translateY(-1px)`
  - Transition: `all 0.2s`

#### **BUTTON - SECONDARY**
- **Background:** Transparent
- **Border:** 1px solid `--border-default`
- **Text Color:** `--text-primary`
- **Border Radius:** `--radius-md`
- **Hover State:**
  - Background → `--bg-card`
  - Border → `--border-strong`

#### **BUTTON - LARGE**
- **Padding:** `--space-4` (16px) vertical, `--space-8` (32px) horizontal
- **Font Size:** 1rem

#### **HERO BADGE**
- **Style:** Pill-shaped (`border-radius: var(--radius-full)`)
- **Border:** 1px solid `--border-default`
- **Padding:** `--space-2` (8px) vertical, `--space-4` (16px) horizontal
- **Dot Indicator:** 6px circle with `--brand-primary` color
- **Animation:** Pulse keyframe (opacity 1→0.6, scale 1→0.9, infinite 2s)
- **Text:** UPPERCASE, 0.75rem, letter-spacing 0.05em

#### **INPUT FIELD**
- **Background:** `--bg-secondary` (#0F0F0F)
- **Border:** 1px solid `--border-default`
- **Border Radius:** `--radius-md` (8px)
- **Padding:** `--space-3` (12px) vertical, `--space-4` (16px) horizontal
- **Font:** Inter, 0.875rem, Regular
- **Text Color:** `--text-primary`
- **Placeholder:** `--text-muted`
- **Focus State:**
  - Border → `--brand-primary`
  - Box-shadow → `0 0 0 3px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.1)`
  - Outline: none

#### **ICON VISUAL (Signature Style)**
Composition for feature icons with organic aesthetic:
1. **Container:** Position relative, centered
2. **Shape (Background):**
   - Dimensions: 60px width × 70px height
   - Border-radius: `40% 60% 30% 70% / 50% 40% 60% 50%` (organic blob)
   - Gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, --neutral-dark-700, --neutral-light-300)`
3. **Accent Circle:**
   - 24px diameter
   - `--brand-primary` color
   - Position: absolute top -5px, right 10px
   - Box-shadow: `--shadow-glow`

---

### 7. GRID SYSTEM

| Class | Configuration | Gap |
|-------|---------------|-----|
| `.grid` | Base grid | `--space-6` (24px) |
| `.grid-2` | 2 columns (1fr 1fr) | `--space-6` |
| `.grid-3` | 3 columns (1fr 1fr 1fr) | `--space-6` |
| `.grid-4` | 4 columns (1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr) | `--space-6` |

**Responsive Breakpoints:**
- **Max-width: 1024px:** All grids collapse to 1 column
- **Max-width: 768px:** Nav links hidden, reduced hero title size (2.5rem), grid collapse

**Container:**
- **Max-width:** 1400px
- **Margin:** 0 auto
- **Padding:** 0 `--space-8` (32px)

---

### 8. INTERACTION PATTERNS & ANIMATIONS

#### **Pulse Animation** (Hero Badge Dot)
```css
@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.9); }
}
```
- Duration: 2s
- Timing: ease-in-out
- Infinite loop

#### **Navigation Active State**
- Active link color: `--brand-primary`
- Underline indicator: 2px solid orange bar below text

#### **Card Hover Behavior**
- Smooth transition: all 0.3s ease
- Border color shift: `--border-default` → `--border-strong`
- Background: `--bg-card` → `--bg-card-hover`

#### **Button Hover Behavior (Primary)**
- All 0.2s transition
- Lift effect: `translateY(-1px)`
- Glow shadow activated: `--shadow-glow`
- Color shift: `--brand-primary` → `--brand-secondary`

#### **Smooth Scrolling**
- Anchor links (`a[href^="#"]`) trigger smooth scroll behavior
- Active nav sync: Auto-detect section in viewport (offset -200px) and update nav link styling

---

### 9. ICON SYSTEM

**Six Featured Icons in Brand Book:**

1. **Notifications** - Bell icon with orange notification dot
2. **Dashboard** - 2x2 grid with one active (orange) square
3. **Actions/Zap** - Lightning bolt with sparkle accent
4. **Analytics** - Three ascending bars (increasing heights, rightmost in orange)
5. **Security** - Shield with lock center element (orange)
6. **Innovation** - Light bulb with filament (orange)

**Icon Container Style:**
- Background: Semi-transparent dark (#2F323A with 0.4 opacity)
- Border: Thin white stroke (1px, 0.1 opacity)
- Thin border-radius: 11.5px (slight rounding)
- Dimensions: 64px × 64px standard

**Icon Design Principles:**
- Geometric, clean shapes
- White as primary color
- Orange (#F75105) for active/important elements
- Consistent proportions and spacing
- Minimaliste aligned with brand

---

### 10. LOGO VARIANTS & USAGE

**Official Logo Specs:**

| Variant | File | Background | Usage | Min Size |
|---------|------|-----------|-------|----------|
| Full Logo Light | logo_01.svg/png | Light background | Marketing, high contrast | 120px |
| Full Logo Dark | logo_02.svg/png | Dark background | Dark UI, dark backgrounds | 120px |
| Compact | logo_03.svg/png | Light background | Secondary placements | 120px |
| **Icon-Only White** | **logo_04.svg/png** | **Dark background** | **OFFICIAL HEADER LOGO** | **32px** |
| Additional | logo_05.png | - | Alternative use | 120px |

**Logo Usage Rules:**
- ✓ Use only official files provided
- ✓ Respect 20% protection space around logo
- ✓ Choose variant suited to background contrast
- ✓ Maintain proportions on resize
- ✓ Minimum sizes: 32px (icon), 120px (full logo)

**Logo Misuse Prevention:**
- ✗ Never distort, stretch, or compress
- ✗ Never change colors without authorization
- ✗ Never add effects (shadows, strokes, gradients)
- ✗ Never place on low-contrast backgrounds
- ✗ Never redraw or recreate logo

---

### 11. DESIGN GUIDELINES & PRINCIPLES

#### **Clarity & Minimalism**
- Favor simplicity and efficiency
- Clear, obvious visual hierarchies
- Avoid visual overload
- Generous spacing for "respiration"
- Orange as accent only, not dominant

#### **Accessibility & Readability**
- Minimum contrast ratio: 4.5:1 for all text
- Minimum body text size: 14px
- Touch targets: 44×44px minimum on mobile
- Keyboard navigation functional on all interactive elements

#### **Visual Consistency**
- Use only defined colors, fonts, components
- Respect spacing system (multiples of 4px)
- Maintain border-radius consistency
- Apply transitions/animations uniformly

#### **Performance & Responsiveness**
- Font smoothing: `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased`
- Overflow-x: hidden (no horizontal scroll)
- Responsive grid collapse at 1024px and 768px breakpoints
- Mobile-first considerations throughout

---

### 12. SOURCE OF TRUTH HIERARCHY

1. **`brand_book.html`** (ABSOLUTE TRUTH) - The definitive visual reference. Open in browser to see exact colors, shadows, radii, and typography rendering.

2. **`k3rn.labs_ui_design_system_canonical.md`** (TECHNICAL REFERENCE) - Developer translation of Brand Book. Lists all tokens and implementation details for CSS/Tailwind configuration.

3. **`logo_k3rb.labs/`** - Official graphic assets (SVG + PNG variants).

**Implementation Principle:** "Never invent values. Use only tokens defined in the design system."

---

### 13. TAILWIND/CSS CONFIGURATION REQUIREMENTS

All developers must configure:

- **globals.css:** Define all CSS custom properties (`:root` variables)
- **tailwind.config.js:** Extend with K3RN.LABS tokens for Tailwind classes
- **No style exceptions:** Use tokens exclusively

**Key Tailwind Extensions:**
- Colors: Brand primary/secondary, neutral scale, backgrounds
- Spacing: All `--space-*` values
- BorderRadius: All `--radius-*` values
- BoxShadow: All `--shadow-*` values including `shadow-glow`
- FontFamily: Inter system stack
- LineHeight: Per-role specifications

---

## FINAL COMPLIANCE CHECKLIST

Every page/component must validate:

- [ ] Background is `--bg-primary` (#000000)
- [ ] Font is Inter throughout
- [ ] Cards have 24px border-radius (`--radius-2xl`)
- [ ] Card padding is 32px (`--space-8`)
- [ ] Card border is 1px solid with `--border-default`
- [ ] Orange glow (`--shadow-glow`) used sparingly on accents/hovers
- [ ] Spacing uses token system (minimum `--space-8` or `--space-12` between major blocks)
- [ ] All buttons follow primary/secondary patterns
- [ ] Inputs have focus state with orange border + ring
- [ ] Navigation links have active state indicator
- [ ] Hero section uses Light weight (300) titles
- [ ] No custom colors outside palette
- [ ] No arbitrary border-radius values
- [ ] Responsive grid collapse functional
- [ ] All text meets 4.5:1 contrast minimum

---

## DOCUMENT LOCATIONS

- Primary folder: `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/brand_design/`
- Logo assets: `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/brand_design/logo_k3rb.labs/`
- Supporting docs: `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/documents/`

This comprehensive guide covers every design token, rule, visual pattern, component specification, typography rule, spacing system detail, color palette nuance, and interaction pattern documented in the K3RN.LABS design system.
